verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Each time I stop and take the time to look around me, I see the signs of His appearing everywhere. Things He said to come to pass are now before me. I can feel the strange excitement in the air.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just any day now, our Lord is coming. He'll be returning for you and me. Oh, I've been watching and I've been waiting. Just any day now, His face I'll see.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's this longing in my heart for His appearing. I'll gladly leave behind these trials here below. For this journey has been hard and I'm so weary, But, Lord, I feel I'm so much closer home.
